title: flutter_launcher_icons_flavors
description: Config schema for flutter_launcher_icons_flavors. Accepts the consolidated multi-flavor layout, the single-config layout, and the pubspec-inline layout.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this schema.

defaults.description: Shared base that is deep-merged into every flavor block.

flavors.description: Map of flavor name → flavor-specific overrides.

oneOf.description: Pubspec inline (`pubspec.yaml` with `flutter_launcher_icons:` or deprecated `flutter_icons:` block).

image_path.description: Source PNG used by every enabled platform.

image_path_ios_dark_transparent.description: iOS 18+ dark-mode variant (transparent PNG composited over system background).

image_path_ios_tinted_grayscale.description: iOS 18+ tinted variant (grayscale PNG; iOS applies user tint).

android.description: Android platform toggle. `true` → default name `ic_launcher`; a string sets a custom resource name `[a-z0-9_]+`; `false` skips Android.

ios.description: iOS platform toggle. `true` → default catalog name `AppIcon`; a string sets a custom catalog basename; `false` skips iOS.

min_sdk_android.description: Android minSdk floor. Below 26, only legacy icons are emitted; 26+ also produces adaptive icons. Default 24.

copy_mipmap_xxxhdpi_to_drawable.description: Copy `mipmap-xxxhdpi/<icon>.png` into the same flavor’s `drawable/` folder. Useful for notification icons. Default false.

adaptive_icon_background.description: Adaptive-icon background. Either a hex color (`#RRGGBB`) or a path to a background image. Required when `adaptive_icon_foreground` is set.

adaptive_icon_foreground.description: Adaptive-icon foreground PNG. Keep logo in central 66 % safe-zone; outer 33 % is masked.

adaptive_icon_foreground_inset.description: Percentage of additional padding around the foreground. Default 16.

remove_alpha_ios.description: Strip alpha channel before writing iOS icons. Required for App Store submission. Default false.

background_color_ios.description: Opaque background color used when `remove_alpha_ios: true`. Default `#FFFFFF`.

flavor.description: Explicit flavor name override. Wins over the filename-derived flavor (upstream #490).

xcodeproj_path.description: Optional Xcode project path. Default auto-detects `ios/*.xcodeproj`, falling back to `ios/Runner.xcodeproj`.

ios_legacy_sizes.description: Emit legacy 1x iOS sizes alongside the modern set so the app switcher / older surfaces find every size (upstream #661). Default false.

ios_single_size.description: Xcode 14+ "single size" mode: emit only the 1024×1024 marketing slot. Overrides `ios_legacy_sizes`. Default false.

optimize_png.description: Run every output PNG through max-compression encoding (slower; 30–70 % smaller files). Default false.

ios_disable_liquid_glass.description: Mark Contents.json for Xcode 26+ Liquid-Glass opt-out (upstream #657, stub). Default false.

non_square_image_ok.description: Suppress the doctor’s non-square source warning (upstream #214). Default false.

generate.description: Master switch for web icon generation.

image_path.description: Source PNG override; falls back to top-level.

output_path.description: Output directory. Defaults to `web_<flavor>/` if flavor is active, else `web/` (upstream #426).

favicon_path.description: Favicon source override. Falls back to `image_path`, then top-level `image_path`.

favicon_size.description: PNG favicon side length in pixels. Default 16.

generate.description: Master switch for Windows icon generation.

image_path.description: Source PNG override; falls back to top-level.

icon_size.description: Max embedded size for the multi-image ICO. Default 48; range 48–256.

generate.description: Master switch for macOS icon generation.

image_path.description: Source PNG override; falls back to top-level.

padding.description: Resize source to 824×824 on a 1024×1024 transparent canvas (Apple’s recommended effective-design area, upstream #655). Default false.

dark_image_path.description: Source for the macOS dark-mode appearance variant (upstream #660).

tinted_image_path.description: Source for the macOS tinted appearance variant (upstream #660).

generate.description: Master switch for Linux icon generation.

image_path.description: Source PNG override; falls back to top-level.

output_path.description: Output path for the PNG. Default `linux/runner/resources/app_icon.png`.

text.description: Badge text. Empty/whitespace triggers a warning.

font_size_pct.description: Font size as % of image height. Default 18.

font_family.description: Built-in font name (`Roboto`, `RobotoMono`, `Inter`) or path to a `.ttf` file.

padding_pct.description: Padding from edge as % of image height. Default 4.

icons.description: Map of alternate-icon name → image source paths. Each entry produces a separate `<name>.appiconset/` directory.

trayIconConfig.description: Desktop tray icon config (upstream #510, phase 1: schema only).

image_path.description: Source image (non-macOS). Falls back to the platform’s `image_path`.

template_image_path.description: macOS template image (monochrome silhouette with alpha). The macOS writer refuses to default to the colored launcher image.

sizes.description: Embedded sizes (Windows ICO / macOS imageset / Linux PNGs).

platformToggle.description: Tri-state platform toggle. `false` disables, `true` uses the default name, a string sets a custom resource/catalog name.
